stimulus.description: Stimulus-presentation event for a canonical Flanker trial.

response.description: Participant keyboard response event for a canonical Flanker trial.

onset.Description: Event onset in seconds relative to the synthetic participant-local task start.

duration.Description: Event duration in seconds. Stimulus rows use the deterministic synthetic RT; response rows are instantaneous.

trial_index.Description: One-based index of the originating Flanker trial within the deterministic schedule.

event_type.Description: Whether the row represents a stimulus presentation or a participant response event.

condition.Description: Congruent or incongruent condition label inherited from the canonical Flanker trial.

trial_type.Description: Canonical Flanker subtype combining congruency and target direction.

Levels.congruent-left: Congruent trial with leftward target direction.
Levels.congruent-right: Congruent trial with rightward target direction.
Levels.incongruent-left: Incongruent trial with leftward target direction.
Levels.incongruent-right: Incongruent trial with rightward target direction.

stimulus.Description: Rendered arrow string for the trial. Present on stimulus rows and repeated on response rows for provenance.

target_direction.Description: Direction of the central target arrow.

flanker_direction.Description: Direction of the surrounding flanker arrows.

correct_direction.Description: Correct conceptual response direction for the target arrow.

response_direction.Description: Direction implied by the observed synthetic response key. Blank on stimulus rows.

Levels.left: Synthetic response maps to a leftward response.
Levels.right: Synthetic response maps to a rightward response.

correct_response_key.Description: Keyboard key mapped to the correct response direction for the participant.

response_key.Description: Synthetic keyboard key emitted for the demo dataset. Blank on stimulus rows.

accuracy.Description: Deterministic synthetic correctness indicator from the originating trial table. Blank on stimulus rows.

accuracy_label.Description: Categorical correctness label used to derive response-event HED tags. Blank on stimulus rows.

mapping_variant.Description: Response-mapping variant for the synthetic participant.

synthetic.Description: Literal indicator that the event row is synthetic demo data.

HED.Description: Row-specific HED string derived from deterministic runtime metadata and checked-in Flanker mapping rules.
